title: [FIRRTL] Grand Central Views with trivial connections are erroring

features.name: firrtl node driven by input port in view annotation context
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.node driven by an input port, used in a Grand Central View annotation where the node source is not a ConstantOp or RefResolveOp
features.snippet:
input x: UInt<1>
node c = x

features.name: firrtl strictconnect to instance port from parent module
features.description: Code should include a strictconnect operation connecting a parent module's signal to an instance port, creating a trivial connection path for Grand Central View processing
